steps.title: Keep the reply declarative
steps.content: After the question about the word's origin, the next sentence gives an interesting statement before adding where the word first appears. That statement should use normal subject-before-verb order and end with a period.

steps.title: Match order and punctuation
steps.content: Choice B uses statement word order but ends with a question mark. Choice C and Choice D use question-style inversion but end with periods. The standard statement form with a period fits the context. The answer is A.
